title: Special Education: Transition Services
description: Transition services help students with disabilities prepare for life after high school, including college, vocational training, employment, and independent living. The district outlines how it plans and delivers these services as part of each eligible student's individualized education program, typically beginning at age 16 or earlier. Families and students play an important role in shaping these plans to reflect the student's strengths, interests, and long-term goals.
